legalReview.by: EXEMPLAR ONLY - engineering placeholder pending attorney review

body.heading: Declaration
body.text: I, {{declarantName}}, being of sound mind, make this statement as a directive to be followed if I become permanently unable to participate in decisions regarding my medical care. These instructions reflect my firm and settled commitment to decline medical treatment under the circumstances indicated below.

body.heading: Directions
body.text: I direct my attending physician and other medical personnel to withhold or withdraw treatment that serves only to prolong the process of my dying, if I should be in an incurable or irreversible mental or physical condition with no reasonable expectation of recovery.

body.heading: Artificial Nutrition and Hydration
body.text: I direct that artificial nutrition and hydration be withheld or withdrawn under the circumstances described above.

body.heading: Execution
body.text: These directions express my legal right to refuse treatment. I sign this document in the presence of two adult witnesses, neither of whom is entitled to any portion of my estate.
